name: analytica-frontend-lib
description: Repositório público dos componentes utilizados nas plataformas da Analytica Ensino

scripts.build:clean: rm -rf dist && tsup && npm run build:types
scripts.prepack: npm run add:exports && npm run build:clean
scripts.publish:dry: npm run prepack && npm publish --dry-run && npm run postpack

author: Analytica Ensino LTDA
